subject: blackmail letter
body:
I beleive this to me the first step in a blackmail
scheme.  I do not know the person, or lisa or the
event to which the person refers.
Note: forwarded message attached.


__________________________________________________
Do You Yahoo!?
Tired of spam?  Yahoo! Mail has the best spam protection around 
http://mail.yahoo.com
